name: zeta-vscode
description: Zeta 2.1 edit prediction + FIM autocomplete for VS Code via llama.cpp

zeta.serverUrl.description: llama.cpp server URL for Zeta 2.1 (OpenAI-compatible /v1/completions endpoint)

zeta.maxContextTokens.description: Max prompt tokens before truncation (model has 32K context, leaving room for output)

zeta.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in ms before triggering a completion request

zeta.maxFimTokens.description: Max tokens for FIM autocomplete responses

zeta.maxEditPredictionTokens.description: Max tokens for edit prediction responses

zeta.enableEditPrediction.description: Enable next-edit prediction (Phase 2 - requires edit history tracking)

zeta.experimentalInjectLsp.description: [Experimental] Inject LSP diagnostic and symbol info into prompt context

zeta.fimContextLines.description: Number of context lines before cursor for FIM prompt

zeta.fimSuffixLines.description: Number of context lines after cursor for FIM prompt
